warehouseQuery.query: SELECT V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.REF_HK+'~'+V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE_CODE as REF_HK,   V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.REF_BK as REF_BK,   V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE_CODE as CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE_CODE,   V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE_DESCRIPTION as CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE_DESCRIPTION,   V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_TRAN_RECORD_CODE as CLAIM_TRAN_RECORD_CODE,   CASE WHEN V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_RI_TYPE_CODE IS NULL THEN '~' ELSE V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_RI_TYPE_CODE END as CLAIM_RI_TYPE_CODE , CASE WHEN V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_TRAN_MODIFY_TYPE_CODE IS NULL THEN '~' ELSE V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_TRAN_MODIFY_TYPE_CODE END as CLAIM_TRAN_MODIFY_TYPE_CODE,  V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.TRAN_TYPE_CODE as TRAN_TYPE_CODE  FROM rdv.V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE ORDER BY V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_TRAN_RECORD_CODE,V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_TRAN_MODIFY_TYPE_CODE,V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_RI_TYPE_CODE --

SELECT V_S_REF_GST_TOLERANCE.GST_TOLERANCE_LOW_AMOUNT as GST_TOLERANCE_LOW_AMOUNT, V_S_REF_GST_TOLERANCE.GST_TOLERANCE_HIGH_AMOUNT as GST_TOLERANCE_HIGH_AMOUNT FROM rdv.V_S_REF_GST_TOLERANCE WHERE V_S_REF_GST_TOLERANCE.GST_TOLERANCE_HIGH_AMOUNT IS NULL ORDER BY GST_TOLERANCE_LOW_AMOUNT --

SELECT  V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.REF_HK as REF_HK,  V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.REF_BK as REF_BK,  V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE_CODE as CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE_CODE,  V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE_DESCRIPTION as CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE_DESCRIPTION,  V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_TRAN_RECORD_CODE as CLAIM_TRAN_RECORD_CODE, V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_RI_TYPE_CODE as CLAIM_RI_TYPE_CODE, V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_TRAN_MODIFY_TYPE_CODE as CLAIM_TRAN_MODIFY_TYPE_CODE,  V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.TRAN_TYPE_CODE as TRAN_TYPE_CODE FROM rdv.V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE WHERE V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_TRAN_MODIFY_TYPE_CODE = 'OTHER' ORDER BY CLAIM_TRAN_RECORD_CODE, TRAN_TYPE_CODE--

SELECT  V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.REF_HK as REF_HK,  V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.REF_BK as REF_BK,  V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE_CODE as CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE_CODE,  V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE_DESCRIPTION as CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE_DESCRIPTION,  V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_TRAN_RECORD_CODE as CLAIM_TRAN_RECORD_CODE, V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_RI_TYPE_CODE as CLAIM_RI_TYPE_CODE, V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_TRAN_MODIFY_TYPE_CODE as CLAIM_TRAN_MODIFY_TYPE_CODE,  '~' as TRAN_TYPE_CODE FROM rdv.V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE WHERE V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_TRAN_MODIFY_TYPE_CODE = 'OTHER' ORDER BY CLAIM_TRAN_RECORD_CODE, TRAN_TYPE_CODE--

SELECT  V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.REF_HK as REF_HK,  V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.REF_BK as REF_BK,  V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE_CODE as CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE_CODE,  V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE_DESCRIPTION as CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE_DESCRIPTION,  V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_TRAN_RECORD_CODE as CLAIM_TRAN_RECORD_CODE, V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_RI_TYPE_CODE as CLAIM_RI_TYPE_CODE, V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_TRAN_MODIFY_TYPE_CODE as CLAIM_TRAN_MODIFY_TYPE_CODE,  V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.TRAN_TYPE_CODE as TRAN_TYPE_CODE FROM rdv.V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE WHERE V_S_REF_CLAIM_TRAN_TYPE.CLAIM_RI_TYPE_CODE = 'OTHER' ORDER BY CLAIM_TRAN_RECORD_CODE --

SELECT S_CLAIM_TRAN.TRAN_HK, S_CLAIM_TRAN.TRAN_BK, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Tran_Id, S_CLAIM_TRAN.CLAIM_HK, S_CLAIM_TRAN.CLAIM_BK, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Company_Code, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Number, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Tran_Record_Code, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Payment_Type_Code, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Tran_Type_Code, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Tran_Batch_ID, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_RI_Type_Code, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Tran_Modify_Type_Code, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Tran_RI_Broker_Account_Code, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Tran_Date_Key, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Tran_Last_Modified_Datetime, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Acct_Period_Code, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Tran_Payment_Single_Stage_YN, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Tran_Ground_Up_Outs_Amount, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Tran_Ground_Up_Paid_Amount, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Tran_RI_Paid_Amount, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Tran_RI_Outs_Amount, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Tran_UX_Paid_Amount, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Tran_UX_Outs_Amount, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Tran_Recovery_Amount, S_CLAIM_TRAN.GST_Division_Code, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Cheq_Reqn_Type_Code, S_CLAIM_TRAN.CLAIM_PAYEE_TRAN_BK, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Payment_Description, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Payment_GST_Rate, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Payment_CITCE_Percent, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Payment_GST_Expected_Amount, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Payment_GST_Claimed_Amount, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Payment_GST_Difference_Amount, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Payment_Country_Code, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Tran_Ground_Up_Incurred_Amount, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Tran_RI_Incurred_Amount, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Tran_UX_Incurred_Amount, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Tran_Gross_Outs_Amount, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Tran_Gross_Paid_Amount, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Tran_Net_Incurred_Amount, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Tran_Net_Outs_Amount, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Tran_Net_Paid_Amount, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Payment_Amount, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Payment_Incl_GST_Amount, S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Tran_Gross_Incurred_Amount, S_CLAIM_TRAN.CTL_BATCH_ID, S_CLAIM_TRAN.CTL_JOB_ID, S_CLAIM_TRAN.CTL_LOAD_DM  FROM  bdv.S_CLAIM_TRAN order by S_CLAIM_TRAN.Claim_Tran_Id
